title: Scrying Statues
description: Have you ever wanted to spy on your friends, but are tired of all those pesky little tech mods? Well now there's a solution! Spy on your friends, secure your base, monitor your valuables, all without a single volt transferred.
body:
# Scrying Statues

Have you ever wanted to spy on your friends, but are tired of all those pesky little tech mods? Well now there's a solution! Spy on your friends, secure your base, monitor your valuables, all without a single volt transferred.

![Statue watches over a village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2284abd4e224f2a50dd2c571942bd6368f39f3df.png)


This mod provides a low-tech option for survelaince, using enchanted stone statues. You can peer through their eyes into your base, your friends base, or perhaps even your enemies base.

The statues are locked down to their creator, only allowing them to bind scrying mirrors to themself. However the mirrors themself are much simpler, and can be used by anyone once bound. Feel free to share them with other trusted players, allowing them to look with you.
